parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Determines the mathematical function used to create the blur.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: Sets the extend conditions to determine what happens to the blur at the edge of the image.

parameters.name: preshrink
parameters.label: Pre-Shrink
parameters.description: Reduces the image's resolution before applying the blur.	This effectively applies a 2x2 box filter on the input and creates a smaller texture to do the full blur operation on. It behaves as if the ker

parameters.name: size
parameters.label: Filter Size
parameters.description: The amount of blur in pixels. If you want a resolution-independent blur, use an expression like in this parameter (which would result in a 1% image blur).

parameters.name: offsetunit
parameters.label: Sample Step Unit
parameters.description: Select between Pixel, Fraction, or Fraction Aspect as the units to use for the Sample Step parameter.

parameters.name: dither
parameters.label: Dither
parameters.description: Enabling makes 8-bit blurs look smoother.  This can help if the blur operation introduces banding or other unexpected artifacts.

parameters.name: offsetz
parameters.label: Offsetz
parameters.description: When sampling the image, this determines the distance from each pixel to the sample pixel. When units are set to pixels, it is the number of pixels away from the current pixel which is sampled to blur

parameters.name: rotatez
parameters.label: Rotatez
parameters.description: Rotates the blur filter. More noticeable when Method is set to Horizontal.
